news.t: It's Nvidia's World: How Advisors See the Next Phase of AI

holdings.infoBox: CNEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.11%, Microsoft at 6.84%, Amazon.com at 6.04%, Alphabet at 6.04%, and Anthropic at 5.85%.

overview.description: The Alger Concentrated Equity ETF (CNEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, targeting large-cap companies with high growth potential. The fund maintains a concentrated portfolio of no more than 30 stocks, seeking long-term captial appreciation CNEQ was launched on Apr 4, 2024 and is issued by Alger.

data.text: Sometimes it feels like it's Nvidia's world, and we are all just living in it. As we brace for the firm's latest earnings report coming Wednesday, we could say that Nvidia (NVDA) earnings — and more i...
